## Type of change

## Content changes checklist

If you updated guide/cert/career data:
- [ ] All links tested and working
- [ ] Official GOV.UK / charity sources cited
- [ ] `GUIDE_LAST_UPDATED` date updated if applicable
- [ ] No personally identifying data included

## Testing

- [ ] `npm test` passes (10/10)
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] Tested in browser (mobile viewport)
